# AI Builder Day Part 2

> Utah's biggest AI event returns. Two days of learning, building, and launching. Friday, August 14 is for learning (speakers, tutorials, AI-for-beginners sessions). Saturday, August 15 is the AI Builder Day Hackathon with $35K+ in prizes and hiring opportunities. Presented by JustBuild and the Startup State Initiative. Part 1 drew 350+ builders; Part 2 is next.

## Event Details

- **Dates:** August 14–15, 2026
- **Location:** Lehi, UT (venue announced soon)
- **Cost:** Free
- **Audience:** Engineers, designers, students, business owners, founders, first-timers, anyone curious about AI. No experience required.
- **Website:** https://aibuilderday.com
- **Contact:** hello@justbuild.ing
- **Register:** https://luma.com/aibuilderday

## Day 1 · Friday, August 14 (Learn)

- 8:00 AM · Doors open, check-in, breakfast
- 9:00 AM · Welcome & kickoff
- 9:30 AM · Speaker sessions. AI leaders, founders, and builders share what's working now
- 10:15 AM · Break
- 10:30 AM · Tutorials. Learn what's possible with AI
- 12:00 PM · Lunch & expo
- 12:30 PM · Featured speakers
- 1:00 PM · Bounty presentations
- 1:30 PM · Start building / optional onboarding
- 5:00 PM · Building closes for the day

## Day 2 · Saturday, August 15 (AI Builder Day Hackathon)

- 8:00 AM · Building opens
- 10:00 AM · Optional workshops and learning sessions
- 2:00 PM · Judging begins
- 3:30 PM · Judges deliberate
- 4:00 PM · Awards ceremony
- 5:00 PM · Building closes

Schedule is subject to change. Speakers, sponsors, and bounty tracks announced soon.

## What to Expect

- Hands-on workshops covering the latest AI tools
- Bounty tracks from real companies with real problems
- Team formation and mentorship
- Final demos in front of investors and ecosystem leaders
- $35K+ in prizes and hiring opportunities

## About JustBuild

JustBuild is Utah's premier AI community on a mission to make Utah AI-native. Engineers, founders, and builders host hackathons, coworking sessions, and events across the state. Part 1 of AI Builder Day drew 350+ builders.

## Links

- Home: https://aibuilderday.com
- JustBuild: https://justbuild.ing
- Slack: https://tinyurl.com/jbslack
- X: https://x.com/justbuildHQ
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/justbuild-ing/
